summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact confirms this shard is not a dedupe cluster and has no shared canonical. Most hydrated PRs should remain open for proof/review/merge-preflight work; #90577 is security-sensitive and must route to central security handling. Several listed candidates were unavailable in the preflight artifact because GitHub hydration hit the installation rate limit, so those receive item-scoped needs_human actions rather than any close-style plan.
